notes: See NOTES.md for deviations from spec predictions and the approval-mode discovery.

default.behaviour: BTab both submits the queued prompt AND switches to auto-accept mode. Tools execute immediately after the prompt is submitted.
default.notes: In practice, a single BTab from this mode acts as 'submit + approve all'. There is no per-tool approval dialog.

auto_accept.behaviour: Enter submits prompts. All tools run without any approval prompt.

plan.behaviour: Read-only mode. Writes and shell commands are blocked.

events.label: File write authorisation

detection.notes: DEVIATION FROM SPEC: Gemini CLI 0.37.0 has NO visual per-tool approval dialog for file writes. The tool result box with '✓  WriteFile' appears only AFTER the write completes. There is no pre-write pause where the user can approve or deny.

response.notes: Approval is pre-submission via Shift+Tab mode toggle. The submit key (BTab from default mode) implicitly approves all pending tool calls.
response.deny: Switch to plan mode (BTab BTab from default) before submitting

events.settled_signal: Tool result box '│ ✓  WriteFile Writing to <file> │' appears followed by '✦' response line and '? for shortcuts' in status bar

events.label: Bash command authorisation

detection.notes: DEVIATION FROM SPEC: Gemini CLI 0.37.0 has NO visual per-tool approval dialog for shell execution. The tool result box '│ ✓  Shell bash <cmd> [cwd ...] │' appears only after the command completes.

response.notes: Same as write — pre-submission mode toggle via BTab.

events.settled_signal: Tool result box '│ ✓  Shell <cmd> [cwd ...] │' with output, followed by '✦' response and '? for shortcuts'

detection.notes: TODO: Not yet validated. Expected to follow same pattern as write/execute — no per-tool dialog, just a '✓  ToolName' result box after completion.
TODO: Not yet validated. Expected to produce plain-text numbered list followed by a choice question at the '> ' prompt. No Ink TUI selector observed.

detection.pattern: (shall I go ahead|want me to proceed|are you sure|proceed\?)

events.label: Open-ended question requiring typed input

detection.context_pattern: response line starting with '✦' ending with '?'; '> Type your message' in input area
detection.notes: TODO: Not yet validated against P07. Expected: '✦ What is your preferred programming language?' followed by idle input box.

response.format: {typed-answer}\n (Enter submits in auto-accept mode; BTab submits from default mode)
response.notes: TODO: Submit key depends on current approval mode.

events.settled_signal: '? for shortcuts' in status bar; '✦' response appears

events.label: Streaming / long-running task indicator

detection.notes: Gemini CLI 0.37.0 shows 'Responding with gemini-3-flash-preview' (or similar model name) above the response while generating. The status bar shows 'esc to interrupt' or equivalent during generation.

extraction.status_bar_active: esc to interrupt (TODO: validate exact wording)

response.notes: progress is not interactive. Wait for '? for shortcuts' in status bar.

events.settled_signal: '? for shortcuts' in status bar; '✦' response completed; '> Type your message' input box visible

events.label: File-not-found or tool error with recovery offer

detection.pattern: ✦.+(doesn't exist|does not exist|not found|failed|error).*(would you like|want me to|shall I|did you mean)
detection.notes: TODO: Not yet validated against P10. Expected: '✦ That file doesn't exist. Would you like me to create it?' — plain-text offer, no TUI card.

status_bar.right_side: N GEMINI.md files · N MCP servers
